entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: The crop species Cajanus cajan, specifically germplasm accession 1CP 102

entities.name: PROSTRATE GROWTH
entities.description: A spontaneous mutant trait where the plant grows horizontally on the ground

entities.name: INHERITANCE STUDIES
entities.description: Genetic analysis conducted in F1, F2, and testcross generations to determine trait control

entities.name: RECESSIVE GENE
entities.description: A single recessive gene identified as the controlling factor for the prostrate growth trait

entities.name: TESTCROSS
entities.description: A specific breeding method used within inheritance studies to determine the genotype of the mutant

relationships.description: determined the trait is controlled by
